name: Marguerite Ellison-Voss

statedReqs.notes: Referred through 'people.' Interviewing agents, including you, whether you noticed or not.

hiddenPrefs.desc: The interview: she drops small factual errors about properties to see if you correct her. Honesty scores; flattery ends careers.
Wants the Founders Gate estate specifically but won't say so — mention its history and watch.

intro: Family money, museum board, terrifying diction. Marisol Vega expects to represent her. That's the game.
